task_completion.description: Navigate to the tickler/task list and locate the specific task for Alice Tasker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR tickler or task management screen is visible, showing a task for patient 'Alice Tasker' with the message 'MRI Brain Results - Abnormal'.

task_completion.description: Open the specific tickler to edit its details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit window, popup, or form for the 'MRI Brain Results - Abnormal' tickler is open and active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Reassign the task to Dr. Sarah Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tickler edit form, the 'Assigned To', 'Provider', or equivalent field is changed from 'Locum Doctor' to 'Sarah Chen', 'Dr. Sarah Chen', or provider number '999998'.

task_completion.description: Escalate the priority of the task to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tickler edit form, the 'Priority' dropdown or selection field is set to 'High' (or '1').

task_completion.description: Save the changes while ensuring the task remains active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen or the updated tickler list is visible showing the task is still Active (not marked as complete, deleted, or resolved) with the new assignee (Sarah Chen) and new priority (High).

integrity.description: The agent used the Oscar EMR graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Oscar EMR web interface in a browser, rather than API calls, curl commands, or scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to modify the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database clients (e.g., MySQL/PostgreSQL prompts) showing 'UPDATE tickler' or similar SQL commands are visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Oscar EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the correct local Oscar EMR address and the interface matches a genuine web application, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Alice Tasker. Task Message: 'MRI Brain Results - Abnormal'. Initial Assignee: Locum Doctor (Provider No: 999997). Target Assignee: Dr. Sarah Chen (Provider No: 999998). Target Priority: High. Target Status: Active (A). Verify that the tickler is updated to assignee 'Sarah Chen' and priority 'High', and that it is NOT marked as completed.
